name: get_concept
description: Fetch the full markdown of a knowledge concept by id from this origin's bundle.

# get_concept

Fetch the full markdown of a knowledge concept by id from this origin's bundle. Generated by `llms-skills memory` from this origin's OKF
knowledge bundle; backed by a hash-verified BM25 snapshot (origin memory,
Executable Skills v0.4 §2.4). Call the tool rather than improvising: the
runtime executes it verbatim in a sandbox.
